title: Manchester Mothmen Clothes & Carpet Moth Monitoring Traps | 5 Sticky Pheromone Monitoring Traps for Wardrobe | Premium Moth Monitoring Catchers Indoors
bullet_points: A 3-IN-1 FORMULA: Our monitoring traps use a finely-tuned pheromone profile that help them monitor all three of the main clothes moths species: the common clothes moth, the case-bearing clothes moth and the pale-backed clothes moth. That’s a threesome you’d rather avoid!
SIMPLE SET-UP: Peel off the protective layer, fold the trap together and voila: you’ll be able to start tracking those moths in seconds.
ODOURLESS: Our traps are made with just glue and pheromones. The pheromones lure ‘em, and the glue keeps 'em lured. The pheromones are completely odourless... to human noses, that is!

THREE-SIDED TRAP: Since clothes moths tend to crawl rather than fly, this is especially helpful when the monitoring traps are placed on a flat surface like a carpet. Simply rotate to a fresh side whenever you like!

GUIDE INCLUDED: We’ll make an entomologist of you yet! Know thy enemy--learn which species is invading your home, how it likely got there, and what you can do next to tackle this infestation and ensure future moth prevention.
Disclaimer: These traps are intended only for monitoring purposes, and must be used within an integrated pest management strategy.
